description: PHP remote file inclusion vulnerability in SmartSiteCMS 1.0 and earlier, when register_globals is enabled, allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via the root parameter in (1) comment.php, (2) admin/comedit.php, (3) admin/test.php, (4) admin/index.php, and (5) admin/include/inc_adminfoot.php, a different set of vectors than CVE-2006-3162.
